name: Do I need a lawyer for work slip and fall or can I do it myself?
description: Strongly recommended; they increase payouts significantly.

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for work slip and fall or can I do it myself?

acceptedAnswer.text: Strongly recommended; they increase payouts significantly.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, hire one—insurers lowball self-represented claims by 40-60%.** Free consults, contingency fees only if you win.[7] Key factors: They handle paperwork, appeals, third-party suits. Spot employer retaliation. Maximize benefits. DIY risks denial. Most settle pre-trial.
